scripts.build: cross-env INIT_CWD=$PWD next build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-json-modules' node ./scripts/postbuild.mjs
scripts.lint: next lint --fix --dir pages --dir app --dir components --dir lib --dir layouts --dir scripts
scripts.lh:report: (yarn start > /tmp/hitsuji-next.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/hitsuji-next.pid) && sleep 5 && npx lighthouse http://localhost:3000 --only-categories=performance --preset=desktop --chrome-flags="--headless" --output=html --output-path=./lighthouse-report.html && kill "$(cat /tmp/hitsuji-next.pid)"
scripts.notes:sync: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; NOTES="${CPP_NOTES:-/home/hitsuji/Learning/programming/cpp/notes}"; test -d "$NOTES"; SRC="$NOTES"; if [ -d "$NOTES/notes" ] && [ -z "$(find "$NOTES" -maxdepth 1 -type f -name "*.md" -print -quit)" ]; then SRC="$NOTES/notes"; fi; rm -rf data/notes; mkdir -p data/notes/notes; rsync -a --delete --delete-excluded --exclude=".*/" --exclude=".*" --exclude=".obsidian/" --exclude=".trash/" --include="*/" --include="*.md" --exclude="*" "$SRC/" data/notes/notes/; echo "Synced markdown notes from $SRC"'
scripts.notes:resync: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; rm -rf data/notes .contentlayer .next public/search.json; yarn notes:sync'
